name: Accuracy Optimization Loop
description: Increase extraction accuracy from 92.65% to 95% by fixing Unicode issues, improving prop regex, and protecting high-confidence picks.

userStories.title: Robust Text Normalization
userStories.description: Ensure all source text is normalized to ASCII before processing. Handle smart quotes, special apostrophes (St Mary's), and non-ASCII dashes.
acceptanceCriteria: Unicode characters are normalized to ASCII early in the pipeline
St Mary's picks are correctly parsed and validated

userStories.title: Expanded Prop Regex
userStories.description: Improve RuleBasedExtractor to detect player props formatted without colons. Target 'PlayerName Over X Stats'.
acceptanceCriteria: Picks like 'Zion Williamson Over 22.5 Points' are correctly identified as Player Props
Player props are not misclassified as Totals

userStories.title: Refinement Logic Protection
userStories.description: Modify ExtractionPipeline.py to ensure that AI refinement never overwrites a high-confidence rule-based pick with a lower-confidence or invalid AI result.
acceptanceCriteria: Rule-based picks with confidence > 9.0 are preserved
Benchmark results show no regression after refinement pass

userStories.title: Final 95% Verification
userStories.description: Run the full golden set benchmark and verify accuracy is 95% or higher.
